[2018-03-19 21:08] http404error: I really hate how discord lights up a channel when *no* user posts quite often
[2018-03-19 21:11] p0lari (Polari): that happens when someone posts and then deletes their message
[2018-03-19 21:12] p0lari (Polari): the issue is that unlike irc where you just get sent all messages on all channels and your client gets to decide what to do with that info, discord wants to limit the data transfer on their proprietary platform
[2018-03-19 21:13] p0lari (Polari): so channel activity doesn't get toggled by the client noticing there's new stuff, but by the client getting told there's new stuff and not seeing what's actually there before you open the channel to load the messages and check
[2018-03-19 21:13] p0lari (Polari): and it's only at that point that you'll find it was a blocker user or a deleted message
